channel.title: releases on Drupal WxT
channel.description: Recent content in releases on Drupal WxT

item.title: Releases
item.description: Important Expect security releases to appear here within 24 hours of being reported upstream. Release Created Date Description 3.0.0-rc3 2019-10-18T03:08:15Z Features/Updates: Update Drupal Core to 8.7.7 Fix for Core Context patch somehow missing Add StringTranslationTrait to Drush Hooks Claro updated to 1.0-beta1 Add support for proper versioning of Profile tarball for *.info.yml files Add site slogan support to theme-gcwu-fegc Upgrade path:
